title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's gone and done it now ...that old white- beard.

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 2 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
